---
title: "Resume"
description: "Professional resume and profile details for a digital marketing portfolio."
---

## Marcos Anton

**Marketing Major and Digital Marketing Candidate**  
Fontana, CA | [manton@cpp.edu](mailto:manton@cpp.edu) | [GitHub](https://github.com/Manton1234)

View the PDF resume [here](resume/Marcos-Anton-Resume.pdf).  
View the Word resume [here](resume/Marcos-Anton-Resume.docx).

## Education

**Cal Poly Pomona**  
Business Marketing Degree, Marketing Minor  
Graduating Summer 2026

Additional education: West Valley College, Business Management, Accounting, Liberal Arts Sciences, 2019. Certificate (MSc): Technology Management, University of Pretoria, 2018.

## Skills

| Area | Tools and Capabilities |
|---|---|
| Digital Marketing | Google Ads, digital marketing, e-commerce, outreach, SEO planning, paid search |
| Analytics | GA4 measurement planning, KPI design, funnel analysis, dashboard reporting |
| Operations | Project management, dispatching, preventive maintenance programs, vendor coordination |
| Business | Inventory control, supply chain coordination, auditing, process improvement, team leadership |

## Experience

**Tech 24, Ontario**  
Supervisor, Project Management, Dispatching | 2023 - 2025

- Managed PM dispatching and maintenance operations for high-profile commercial accounts including Amazon, Google, LinkedIn, Playa Vista, and 7-Eleven.
- Developed preventive maintenance programs to reduce downtime and improve operational efficiency.
- Coordinated cross-functional teams, procurement, spare parts inventory, safety procedures, inspections, and emergency maintenance response.

**Akins Body Shop, Palo Alto**  
Parts Management / Inventory | 2020 - 2022

- Improved inventory systems, reducing stock outs by 20% and excess inventory by 15%.
- Coordinated with 25-30 vendors to maintain timely parts delivery and a consistent supply chain.
- Conducted audits, resolved discrepancies, generated stock reports, and improved receiving, storing, and issuing procedures.

**Uber Headquarters, San Francisco**  
Recruiter / Filing | 2018 - 2020

- Led a team of 6 to develop and execute recruitment strategies.
- Enrolled 300 individuals into the Uber Driver Program through targeted outreach initiatives.
- Used online and offline methods to attract candidates, conduct interviews, analyze recruitment data, and improve outreach processes.

## Projects

**Digital Marketing Portfolio Website**  
Built a professional Quarto website with project case studies, a dashboard, a Revealjs presentation, SEO metadata, Google Analytics readiness, and clickable static HTML pages.

**Campaign Performance Dashboard**  
Created a dashboard using simulated campaign data to compare spend, revenue, conversions, and funnel movement across marketing channels.

## Certifications

- Google Ads Certificate
- Digital Marketing Certificate
- E-commerce Certificate
